{{Quote|Well, Tekli's friend has good taste.|Mara Jade Skywalker, upon entering the Leafy Green|<ref name="Balance Point" />}}
The '''Leafy Green''' was a [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was built around a central pillar made to look like a tree with branch growing across the ceiling. Its leaves blew in a breeze. The carpet was made to look like leaves, the tabletops were mossy, and the waiters were not droids.<ref name="Balance Point" />

Given the plant-based theme and the fact it was in an are of Coruscant covered in plant-shaped lights and [[Spero]]'s yellow fungus, it likely was either made by or catered to [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]].<ref name="Balance Point" />

[[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Anakin Solo]] came there investigate [[Tekli]]'s suspicions that there was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Unidentified Yuuzhan Vong (Leafy Green)|infiltrator]] working there. Mara noted that since the Vong did not like mechanical "abominations", they would probably choose this place to come to.<ref name="Balance Point" />
